# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. Entries are generated by homeboy from git commits.

## [0.7.5] - 2026-05-04

### Changed
- Add import-grade Markdown fixtures
- Add BFB context passthrough coverage
- Update html-to-blocks-converter to v0.6.17
- Update h2bc bundle to v0.6.16
- Update h2bc bundle to v0.6.15
- Update h2bc bundle to v0.6.14

### Fixed
- resolve PHPStan findings (#95)

## [0.6.0] - 2026-04-29

## [0.5.0] - 2026-04-28

### Added

### Fixed
- preserve code fence language hints

## [0.4.1] - 2026-04-28

### Changed
- cover public conversion matrix
- cover normalization API branches
- cover stale bundled registry winners

## [0.4.0] - 2026-04-28

### Added
- add content normalization API
- measure insert conversion timing
- add bfb_skip_insert_conversion filter
- bundle html-to-blocks-converter as package dependency
- support dual-mode package loading
- table support, code-fence cleanup, input filter
- phase 2 read-side API (blocks → html/markdown)
- scaffold block-format-bridge plugin (Phase 1, write-side parity)

### Changed
- cover multi-consumer bfb bundled load
- refresh bundled h2bc landmark coverage
- cover expanded h2bc transforms
- cover bundled h2bc transform delegation
- install Node for Playground tests
- test newer PHP runtimes
- automate vendor_prefixed refreshes
- run Homeboy tests on PRs
- cover BFB conversion paths
- refresh vendor_prefixed/ to pick up h2bc php-scoper callback fix
- ship vendor_prefixed/ + drop transitive h2bc so consumers get scoped deps
- Revert "fix: convert HTML inserts in package mode (#6)"

### Fixed
- make duplicate BFB versions visible
- refresh scoped html-to-blocks hooks
- preserve WordPress hook APIs in scoped h2bc
- suppress class_alias emission to enable multi-consumer coexistence
- convert HTML inserts in package mode
